title: crataegus monogyna f. azarella
intro: Crataegus monogyna f. azarella, also known as hawthorn azarella, is a subspecies of the hawthorn tree (Crataegus monogyna), a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular protective effects. The health benefits of hawthorn azarella include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Hawthorn azarella is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
